meaning: n.装饰物,观赏植物adj.装饰性的,装饰的,装饰用的
examples: The chimney pots are purely ornamental.
Scented sachets are not only useful, but also ornamental.
It's a fearsome thing that our most enthusiastic member would not have had the temerity to call ornamental.
Complementing activites have been the implementation of housegardens, nurseries and the production of ornamental plants.
Today, the term encompasses a broader range of ornamental homes, from manors to mansions to chateaux.
